{{Otheruses|Gand}}
It was unclear whether '''Gand silencers''' had been created by the [[Gand/Legends|Gand]] or to silence them. It was theorized that these [[Stun baton/Legends|energy batons]] may have been carried by Gand [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] or [[Findsman/Legends|findsmen]] and used in a similar fashion to ordinary [[Stun baton/Legends|stun batons]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
